query:
SELECT 
                s.signature_sha256,
                s.browser,
                s.ip,
                s.created_at,
                r.verification_code,
                c.first_name,
                c.last_name
            FROM contract_signatures s
            JOIN contract_signature_requests r ON s.request_id = r.id
            JOIN contract_participants p ON s.participant_id = p.id
            JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
            WHERE s.contract_id = $1
